mmd:mmd.mmd:title: Title in English
mmd:mmd.mmd:abstract: Summary in English with a short usage note. Project page: https://example.org/mmd/minimal. Contact: data-team@example.org for access and clarification. Synoptic meteorological measurements from MITTARFIK SISIMIUT (HOLSTEINSBORG LUFTHAVN) extracted from the WMO Global Telecommunication System (GTS). Data are not quality controlled after extraction from GTS.

mmd:update.mmd:note: MMD record modified and placed in wrong order
MMD record created from the NetCDF file

mmd:keywords.mmd:keyword: Earth Science > Spectral/Engineering > RADAR > RADAR backscatter
